data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances account security with the requirement of a second authentication factor.
data.technical_spec: Supports OTPs via SMS and authenticator apps.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Network Security
data.description: Deploys firewalls and intrusion detection systems to monitor and protect against threats.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS security tools and custom monitoring solutions.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regularly scans for vulnerabilities and applies patches promptly.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes automated scanning tools and manual testing.

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Implements strong access control measures to restrict internal and external access.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control and single sign-on integration.
